page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores and 56 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, operating at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The processor is equipped with 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 35 MB of L3 cache. It supports instruction sets including AVX, AVX512F, AES, BMI2, ADX, and FMA. The instance is provisioned with 224.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance divergence between single-threaded and multi-threaded operations. Single-core performance is weak, with stress-ng single-core, Geekbench single-core, and bzip3 single-threaded decompression scoring in the bottom 25%, while single-threaded gzip compression falls in the bottom 10%. Conversely, multi-threaded capabilities are more robust; the instance achieves average performance in stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU tests, and reaches the top 25% in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks remains in the average tier.

Given its dedicated resource allocation and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is structured for general-purpose workloads that can leverage parallel processing. It demonstrates average performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, static web serving, and software compilation. It is also capable of moderate LLM inference, showing average prompt processing and text generation speeds for 7B models. However, the lack of local storage and weak single-core performance make it less suitable for single-threaded applications or high-I/O storage-dependent tasks. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a high density of dedicated physical cores, making it a viable option for multi-threaded workloads that do not require high single-core clock speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance featuring 56 dedicated physical cores and 56 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 224.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPUs. The instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Performance benchmarks reveal weak single-core capabilities, with single-threaded compression and decompression scoring in the bottom 10% to 25%. However, its multi-threaded performance is average to strong, highlighted by top-tier multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. This hardware profile is suited for parallelizable workloads such as multi-threaded database operations, static web serving, software compilation, and moderate LLM inference, where dedicated core density offsets lower single-core speeds.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is a general-purpose server with 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 224 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, offering balanced multi-threaded performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge features 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 224 GB RAM, delivering balanced multi-threaded general-purpose performance.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core x86_64 platform with balanced memory-to-CPU allocation, optimized for parallelized general-purpose workloads and multi-threaded processing.

224.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU accelerators.
Strong multi-threaded performance contrasted by weak single-core benchmark results.
Suited for multi-threaded database operations, software compilation, and static web serving.
